questions.question: Which symptom most strongly suggests an asymmetric routing issue with stateful firewalls?
options: Return traffic bypasses the firewall state table
questions.description: Stateful devices may drop return packets when they did not observe the original session setup.

questions.question: Which BGP attribute is typically preferred first in vendor route selection?
questions.description: Local preference is commonly evaluated early to choose outbound paths within an AS.

questions.question: Which design reduces broadcast domain size?
questions.description: VLANs divide Layer 2 networks and reduce broadcast scope.
